---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

[Download Full CV (PDF)](#)

## Education
- **Ph.D. in Geography**, University of Oxford, 2022
- **M.Sc. in GIS**, University of Southern California, 2018
- **B.A. in Environmental Studies**, Universidad de Chile, 2016

## Academic Appointments
- **Assistant Professor**, Department of Geography, [University Name], 2023–Present
- **Postdoctoral Researcher**, NASA Jet Propulsion Laboratory, 2022–2023

## Technical Skills
- **Languages:** Python (Expert), R (Expert), JavaScript, SQL
- **GIS/Remote Sensing:** ArcGIS Pro, QGIS, Google Earth Engine, ENVI
- **Data Science:** Scikit-learn, PyTorch, Xarray, Dask
- **Field Work:** RTK-GPS, Lidar Drone Operations, Bathymetric Surveys
